instructions: This is BlindBox Creator - a Next.js 16 + React 19 + TypeScript e-commerce platform with Stripe + OpenAI/OpenRouter for AI generation. Review with extreme scrutiny on: 1) Payment checkout - Stripe sessions must be server-created with server-side pricing, webhook signature verification required. 2) AI generation API - rate limit AI endpoints, validate inputs, handle API failures gracefully, never expose API keys client-side. 3) Product catalog - verify data integrity, prevent price manipulation. 4) OpenAI/OpenRouter API key handling - keys must never appear in client bundles or logs. 5) Never allow secrets, API keys, or .env values in code.

rules.rule: Stripe checkout sessions must use server-side pricing from the product catalog. Never accept client-submitted prices.
AI generation endpoints must be rate-limited and must validate all inputs. Flag any AI endpoint without rate limiting.
OpenAI and OpenRouter API keys must only be used server-side. Flag any import of API keys in client components.
Product catalog data must be sourced from the database, not hardcoded. Flag hardcoded prices or product data.
AI-generated content must be sanitized before rendering. Flag any dangerouslySetInnerHTML with AI output.
